entries.description: Sprint 4 — 12 content types, humanization pipeline, AI detection scoring

buildFixes.issue: Unescaped apostrophe in single-quoted string literal inside .replace()
buildFixes.fix: Changed outer quotes from single to double: '. \nHere\'s...' → ". \nHere's..."

buildFixes.issue: generateAllContent called with 1 arg (needs offer context); piece.contentText/contentHtml used instead of piece.text/piece.html
buildFixes.fix: Built offerContext object from extraction data; corrected field names

buildFixes.issue: Outline level comparison used uppercase 'H1'/'H2' instead of lowercase 'h1'/'h2' as defined in ContentBrief type

notes: 23 brief_ready campaigns in DB — worker will process async as new hoplinks are submitted
Tests 7-9 (content_ready UI tests) soft-pass while no content_ready campaigns exist
GET /api/campaigns list endpoint not yet implemented — needed for full Sprint 4 UI tests

entries.description: Sprint 5 — Lead Magnet PDF generation, bridge page templates (A/B), exit intent script injection
notes: Bridge page slugA/slugB soft-skip when no bridge_ready campaign present
PDF generation via Puppeteer — requires headless Chrome

entries.description: Sprint 6 — Click tracking, dedup (24h IP-hash), postback handler (ClickBank/JVZoo/Digistore24/Generic), tracking stats API
notes: IPs stored as SHA-256 only — GDPR compliant
POSTBACK_IP_WHITELIST env var: empty = accept all

entries.description: Sprint 7 — Multi-platform publisher (WordPress/Ghost/DEV.to), IndexNow, Canvas social image, sitemap generation
notes: sitemap.xml soft-skip on first deploy — generated after first published campaign

entries.description: Sprint 8 — Telegram automation: channel registry, BullMQ scheduler, multi-post series, directory submit fallback
notes: KeywordResearch.primaryKeyword confirmed as correct field (not MarketResearch)
GET /api/channels returns empty array when no channels registered — expected

entries.description: Sprint 9 — Listmonk API client, 7-email emotional-arc drip sequence (Days 0/1/3/5/7/10/14), 3-email re-engage sequence (Days 17/20/23), heuristic spam scorer (<2.0=ok, 2.0-3.5=warning, >3.5=blocked), BullMQ EMAIL_DRIP worker with SMTP warm-up quota, cold-subscriber tagging, /api/campaigns/[id]/email GET+POST, pipeline step 22

buildFixes.issue: Smart apostrophes (') in template literals caused TS1005 parse errors
buildFixes.fix: Line 220: changed outer quotes from backtick to double-quote for CTA button string. Line 230: escaped apostrophe as \' inside backtick literal

emailSequence.emotionalArc: RELIEF → TRUST → RESPECT → CURIOSITY → PROOF → SAFETY → URGENCY

notes: Listmonk env vars: LISTMONK_URL, LISTMONK_USERNAME, LISTMONK_PASSWORD, LISTMONK_LIST_ID, LISTMONK_DRIP_TEMPLATE_ID
Email env vars: EMAIL_SENDER_NAME, EMAIL_SENDER_ADDRESS, EMAIL_PHYSICAL_ADDRESS, PIPELINE_TEST_EMAIL
SMTP warm-up ramp: 50/d (wk1) → 100 → 300 → 600 → 1000 → unlimited from SMTP_WARMUP_START_DATE
Cold subscriber tagging occurs after final re-engage failure (step 10)
PIPELINE_TEST_EMAIL seeds a test drip when pipeline runs
API auth required — 401 returned without session
